ui.title: IBitcoin yabaFundi
ui.subtitle: Fumanisa ihlabathi lemali, ixabiso neBitcoin!
ui.newPlayerConfirm: Qala umdlali omtsha? Inkqubela yangoku iza kusulwa.
ui.footer: Isekelwe kwiBitcoin yabaFundi yeMy First Bitcoin · CC BY-SA 4.0

sort.instruction: Tsala ukusuka kweyona ixabiso eliphantsi ukuya kweyona ixabiso eliphezulu

modules.title: Ukutshintshiselana, Ixabiso & Ixabiso lentengiso
modules.summary: Ixabiso lixhomekeka kulokho okufunekayo. Ixabiso lentengiso liquka ixabiso lento. Imali isisombululo sengxaki yokutshintshiselana.
modules.description: Fumanisa ukuba kutheni sisebenzisa imali nokuba zixabisa ntoni izinto ngokwenene!

questions.q: Ufikele esiqithini esilahliweyo. Yintoni eyona ixabisekileyo?
questions.explanation: Esiqithini, ngemela enkulu ungagawula iinkuni, unqume ukutya, wakhe indawo yokufihla. Imali nedayimani azinanto enza apho!

questions.q: Uneentonga zokudoba ezi-5 kodwa akunanto yokukhusela ilanga. Ummelwane wakho uneentente ezi-3 kodwa akunantonga yokudoba. Nithini?
questions.explanation: Ukutshintshiselana yindlela endala yokwenza umrhwebo! Unika lokho onganako ukufumana lokho okufunekayo.

options: Kuba kufuneka ufumane umntu ofuna ngqo lokho unakho
questions.explanation: Oku kubizwa ngokuba kukuhlangana kweemfuno. Imali isisombululo — wonke umntu iyamkela imali!

questions.q: Iimbaza zazisetshenziswa njengemali kudala. Yintoni eyenza into ibe yimali entle?
options: Kufuneka inqabe, ithwaleke namphi na kwaye yamkelwe ngabantu bonke
questions.explanation: Imali entle inqabile (ayifumaneki ngokulula), ithwaleka namphi na, kwaye wonke umntu kufuneka ayamkele njengeentlawulo.

questions.q: Ibhotile yamanzi ibiza i-€1 evenkile. Ehlathini lomqhele umntu unikeza i-€100 ngaloo bhotile. Kutheni?
options: Kuba amanzi ahlathini lomqhele anqabile kakhulu kwaye abalulekile
questions.explanation: Ukuqabela kuyashintsha ixabiso! Colosseum kwinto enqabileyo neyidingekayo ngakumbi, ngakumbi ixabiseka.

questions.q: Yintoni umahluko phakathi kwexabiso lentengiso nexabiso?
options: Ixabiso lentengiso liquka ixabiso lento, ixabiso libaluleka kangakanani into kuwe
questions.explanation: Umfanekiso owenzwe ngumntwana wakho mhlawumbi awunaxabiso lentengiso kodwa unexabiso elikhulu. Ixabiso lentengiso nexabiso azifani!

activities.title: Umgca wexabiso
activities.intro: Hlela izinto ngendlela efanelekileyo ukusuka kwexabiso eliphantsi ukuya kweliphezulu!

modules.title: Ixesha, Amandla & Umvuzo
modules.summary: Amandla anemilinganiselo. Ukulinganisa phakathi komsebenzi, kuphumla nomdlalo kubalulekile. Ukuzeka ngomonde kukhokelela kwiziphumo ezingcono.
modules.description: Usebenzisa njani ixesha lakho namandla akho? Kwaye kutheni ukulinda ngamanye amaxesha kubuhlanga?

activities.title: Umsebenzi, Ukuphumla okanye Umdlalo?
activities.intro: Tsala umsebenzi ngamnye uye kwisigaba esifanelekileyo!

questions.q: Kwibali lamagwiba amathathu: yiphi indlu eyasala imi?
questions.explanation: Indlu yezitena yachithe ixesha nomzamo omninzi ukuyakha, kodwa yayiyeyona isalayo imi. Ukuzeka ngomonde kuyabhatala!
Ukukhetha ngexesha elizayo = ukulungela ukulinda isiphumo esingcono. Njengegwiba elaakha indlu yezitena!

questions.q: Ufumana 1 iswidi ngoku, okanye ii-swidi ezi-3 ukuba ulinda imizuzu eli-10. Yintoni ebuhlanga?
questions.explanation: Lo ngumvavanyo wemarshmallow odumileyo! Abantwana ababekwazi ukulinda babeneziphumo ezingcono esikolweni kamva.

questions.q: Uneviwo elibalulekileyo ngomso. Yintoni ukukhetha ngexesha elizayo?
questions.explanation: Ukwenza into enzima ngoku (ukufunda) ukuze ufumane into entle kamva (amanqaku amantle) — oku kukhetha ngexesha elizayo.

questions.q: Kwenzeka ntoni ukuba usebenzisa onke amandla akho ekuseni?
options: Akusayi kuba nanto yaseleyo yonke imini
questions.explanation: Amandla anemilinganiselo! Ukuwabela ngobulumko kubalulekile — njengemali.

modules.title: Analogi ngeDigital
modules.summary: Ubuchwepheshe buyaguquka rhoqo. Ukuqanjwa ngakunye kuxazulula ingxaki. Akuko nto entsha engcono ngokuzenzekelayo.
modules.description: Ukusuka ehibhini de kufikelele ku-intanethi — indlela ubuchwepheshe olushintsha ngayo ihlabathi!

activities.title: Endala ↔ Entsha
activities.intro: Dibanisa ubuchwepheshe obendala nesixhobo salo samanje!

activities.title: Cinga ngekamva
activities.intro: Ubuchwepheshe buya kuba njani kwiminyaka engama-20?

options: Kuba abantu baxazulula iingxaki ngokucinga izinto ezintsha
questions.explanation: Ukuqanjwa ngakunye kuxazulula ingxaki. Imoto yaxazulula ingxaki yokuba amahashe ayadinwa aze ahamba kancinci!

options: Hayi, ngamanye amaxesha obudala bungcono okanye buqinisekile ngakumbi
questions.explanation: Incwadi yephepha ayifuni isibane! Ngamanye amaxesha izixhobo ezindala zisaxabisekile.

questions.q: IBitcoin yimali yeDigital. Ifana ngantoni neembaza zendulo?
options: Zombini zinqabile kwaye zisetshenziswa njengendlela yokutshintshiselana
questions.explanation: Zombini iimbaza neBitcoin zinqabile (ubuninzi bazo bunoMlinganiselo) kwaye zisetshenziswa njengendlela yokutshintshiselana.

options: Ukuphucula okanye ukucinga into entsha exazulula ingxaki
questions.explanation: Ukuqamba = isisombululo esitsha okanye esiphuculiweyo sengxaki ekhona. Wonke umntu angaqamba!

modules.title: Ukhuseleko & Ubumfihlo
modules.summary: Wena uyagqiba ukwabelana ngolwazi lwakho. Ikhowudi zikhuselela imiyalezo. Ukuthemba akuyimfuneko ukuba unayo i-encryption.
modules.description: Ikhowudi eziimfihlo, ubumfihlo nendlela ozikhuselayo ku-intanethi!

activities.title: Esidlangalaleni okanye Yimfihlo?
activities.intro: Le lwazi lisesidlangalaleni okanye lilimfihlo? Chonga ngokukhawuleza!

statements.label: Yimfihlo!
statements.explanation: Iphasiwedi ihlala iyimfihlo. Yabelane nayo ngomntu!

statements.label: Esidlangalaleni
statements.explanation: Esikolweni wonke umntu uyazi igama lakho — olo lwazi lusesidlangalaleni.

statements.label: Yimfihlo!
statements.explanation: Inombolo yakho ye-PIN iyimfihlo — ikhuselela i-akhawunti yakho yasebhange.

statements.label: Esidlangalaleni
statements.explanation: Ipaki yindawo yesidlangalala — wonke umntu angaya apho.

statements.label: Yimfihlo!
statements.explanation: Iincwadi zakho zemfihlo ziyimfihlo — wena kuphela ugqiba ukuba ngubani ongazifunda.

statements.label: Esidlangalaleni
statements.explanation: Wonke umntu angabona umbala webhayisekile yakho.

statements.label: Yimfihlo!
statements.explanation: Idilesi yakho ayabelanwa nabantu abangamaziyo — loo lwazi lilimfihlo.

statements.label: Esidlangalaleni
statements.explanation: Imozulu ifanele wonke umntu — isesidlangalaleni ngokupheleleyo!

statements.label: Yimfihlo!
statements.explanation: Isitshixo sakho sobumfihlo sisimfihlo esibaluleke kakhulu. Osisnazo uneBitcoin yakho!

activities.title: Ikhowudi Eyimfihlo
activities.intro: Qhekeza amagama eBitcoin ayimfihlo ngesondo lenombolo!

modules.title: Imicimbi Yemali
modules.summary: Imali ungayisebenzela, uyigcine, uyityale nokuisebenzisa. Ukwenza isicwangciso semali kukhetha. Imithetho efanelekileyo ibalulekile.
modules.description: Ukusebenzela, ukugcina, ukutyala — yiba ingcali yemali!

activities.title: Ukuhlakanipha nemali
activities.intro: Vavanya ukuba uhlakanipha kangakanani kwimicimbi yemali!

options: Ukubeka imali ecaleni ukuze uyisebenzise kamva
questions.explanation: Ukugcina imali = ukuyigcina ukuze kamva ukhone ukuthenga into enkulu okanye ebalulekileyo.

options: Ukubeka imali okanye ixesha lakho kwindawo ethile ukuze isezixabiseke ngakumbi kamva
questions.explanation: Ukutyala imali kukubeka imali okanye ixesha lakho kwindawo ethile nethemba lokuba izakuxabiseka ngakumbi kamva.

questions.q: Uneembaza ezili-12. Itente ibiza ezi-8 kwaye intonga yokudoba ibiza ezi-6. Ungazithenga zombini?
questions.explanation: 8 + 6 = 14, kodwa uneembaza ezili-12 kuphela. Kufuneka ukhethe! Oku kukwenza isicwangciso semali.

questions.q: Kwi-arhente, ixabiso lento enqabileyo liyakhula. Kutheni?
options: Abantu abaninzi bafuna into, kodwa kukho enye kuphela (ukuqabela + isicelo)
questions.explanation: Ukuba abantu abaninzi bafuna into kodwa kukho enqabileyo yayo, ixabiso liyakhula. Yindlela isicelo nokunikezwa kusebenza ngayo!

options: Ukuze wonke umntu afumane ithuba elifanayo
questions.explanation: Imithetho efanelekileyo iqinisekisa ukuba akukho mntu unokudlala ngokungafanelekanga kwaye wonke umntu unethuba elifanayo.

options: Ukufumana imali komnye umntu ekufuneka uyibuyisele kamva
questions.explanation: Ukuboleka kuthetha ukufumana imali komnye umntu, kodwa kufuneka uyibuyisele kamva — rhoqo nengezelo (inzala).

modules.title: Iimigaqo Yokuqala yeBitcoin
modules.summary: IBitcoin yimali yeDigital enqabileyo ngaphandle kwabaphakathi. I-mining iqinisekisa iintlawulo. USatoshi wahlala engaziwa.
modules.description: Umdlalo omkhulu weBitcoin: ukusuka kuSatoshi ukuya kwi-mining!

questions.explanation: USatoshi Nakamoto wapapasha 'iphephancwadi elimhlophe' ngo-2008 echaza icebo leBitcoin. Akukho mntu owe wazi ukuba uSatoshi ungubani ngokwenene!
Iphephancwadi elimhlophe lixwebhu elinechaza icebo entsha okanye isisombululo esibekwa phambi kwehlabathi.
Ngomhla we-3 Januwari 2009 yenziwa i-Genesis Block — ibhloko yokuqala kwi-blockchain yeBitcoin.
Azisoze zibe ngaphezulu kweebitcoin ezingama-21 yezigidi. Ukuqabela oko kunxityelelwe kwimithetho!

options: Ukusebenzisa ikhompyutha ukuxazulula iipazili ukuze kuqinisekiswe iintlawulo
questions.explanation: Ababaqoqi basebenzisa ikhompyutha ukuxazulula iipazili zemathematika. Njengebungqina bokuba basebenze, bavunyelwa ukuqinisekisa iintlawulo.

options: Ubungqina bokuba umntu uye wazama ngokwenene ukuzuza into
questions.explanation: I-Proof of Work = ubungqina bomsebenzi. Njengodlalo wedayisi: wonke umntu ulandela imithetho efanayo kwaye unawo amathuba afanayo.

options: Ngenene ukuze iBitcoin ibe eyabantu bonke, ngaphandle kwenkokheli
questions.explanation: Ngokonyamalala, uSatoshi waqinisekisa ukuba iBitcoin ayiyoye mntu omnye. Inethiwekhi isebenza ngomthetho, hayi ngenkokheli.

activities.title: Qoqa iBitcoin!
activities.intro: Fumana amaqela afanayo ukuze uqoqe iibhloko — njengababaqoqi bokwenene!
